title: Build BlackRoad Auth Portal
description: SSO + 2FA with beautiful interface. Advanced security features.
result: Built RoadAuth Pro - Enterprise zero-trust identity platform (Product #82). Live at https://fb365a0c.blackroad-admin.pages.dev. Features: Multi-factor auth (TOTP, WebAuthn, YubiKey), SSO (OAuth/OIDC/SAML), Zero-trust architecture, Mobile authenticator, LDAP/AD integration, Policy engine. Pricing: $99/mo Team → $299/mo Business → Custom Enterprise. 🤖 Product #82 of 200+
